package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpStatusIgnoredBeforeDecode() string {
    ruleID := "http_status_ignored_before_decode"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Response decoding or body consumption that happens without an observed StatusCode check."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
